title: Spontaneous Pneumothorax
chief_complaint: Sudden sharp left chest pain and shortness of breath while playing basketball. I can't catch my breath.

physical_exam.Lungs: Absent breath sounds left side, hyperresonance to percussion left hemithorax, trachea shifted to right

hidden_data.cxr: Large left pneumothorax (>50% collapse). No mediastinal shift. No tension physiology. Normal right lung.
hidden_data.ct_chest: Left apical blebs/bullae. No underlying lung disease. Normal parenchyma.

key_learning_points: Most common in tall, thin, young male smokers
Treatment: Large (>2cm) or symptomatic = chest tube or needle aspiration
VATS pleurodesis after second episode or persistent air leak >5 days
